channel.title: +Articles on काव्ये विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on काव्ये विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: Mukta-bodha tAntrika influence
item.description: Literary Works Courtly poetry and plays include important evidence of tantric adepts, rituals, deities, magical practices, and alchemical recipes. Set in fictional or legendary narratives, with exaggerated details, dramatic flourishes, and tropes in service of an array of literary effects, these literary works can sometimes serve as rich sources on tantric lore and observances. While parallels can be found in tantric scriptures, there are occasionally details not attested in other textual sources that supplement our knowledge of early tantric systems of worship.
